grammar.title: Advanced Tenses
grammar.description: Past perfect, future perfect och progressiva former.

exercises.question: 'By the time she arrived, the film ___ already ___.' Choose the correct tense.
exercises.explanation: Past perfect: had + past participle. Describes an action completed before another past action.
exercises.hint: Past perfect: had + past participle – något som hände INNAN en annan förfluten händelse.

exercises.sentence: She ___ (work) for the company for five years before she resigned.
exercises.hint: Past perfect continuous: had been + -ing – pågående handling fram till en punkt i det förflutna.
exercises.explanation: Past perfect continuous: had been + -ing verb. Shows duration up to a past point.

exercises.question: 'I ___ to London three times this year.' Choose the correct tense.
exercises.explanation: Present perfect (have been) for experiences in an unfinished time period (this year).
exercises.hint: 'This year' (ej avslutat) + erfarenhet → present perfect.

exercises.sentence: While he ___ (read), the phone rang.
exercises.hint: Past continuous för pågående handling som avbryts av simple past.
exercises.explanation: Past continuous (was reading) for background action interrupted by past simple (rang).

exercises.question: 'He realised he ___ his keys at home.' Which tense?
exercises.explanation: Past perfect (had left) for action before another past action (realised).
exercises.hint: Past perfect: handling INNAN en annan preteritumshandling.

exercises.sentence: By 2030, scientists ___ (develop) a cure for many diseases.
exercises.hint: Future perfect: will have + past participle – färdigt INNAN en framtida tidpunkt.
exercises.explanation: Future perfect: will have + past participle. Completed before a future point.

exercises.instruction: Bygg meningen: 'Han hade avslutat rapporten innan mötet började.'
exercises.explanation: He had finished the report before the meeting started. – past perfect for prior action.

exercises.question: 'She ___ in New York when she met her husband.' Choose the correct tense.
exercises.explanation: Past continuous (was living) for background circumstances around a specific past event.
exercises.hint: Past continuous: bakgrundshandling när något annat hände.

exercises.sentence: They ___ (travel) for six hours when the engine broke down.
exercises.hint: Past perfect continuous: had been + -ing – pågående handling innan ett avbrott i det förflutna.
exercises.explanation: Past perfect continuous: had been + -ing. Emphasises duration before a past event.

exercises.question: 'By the end of this lesson, we ___ all the verb tenses.' Future perfect?
exercises.explanation: Future perfect (will have learned) for completion before a future deadline.
exercises.hint: Future perfect: will have + past participle – klart INNAN en framtida tidpunkt.

exercises.sentence: I ___ (not/see) this film before, so I'm excited.
exercises.hint: Present perfect för erfarenhet (eller brist på erfarenhet) fram till nu.
exercises.explanation: Present perfect for experience up to now: haven't seen.

exercises.question: Which tense best completes: '___ all morning; that's why I'm tired now.'
exercises.explanation: Present perfect continuous (have been studying) shows a recent activity with a present result.
exercises.hint: Present perfect continuous: pågående aktivitet nyligen → resultat nu.

exercises.sentence: She ___ (write) her novel for three years before it was published.
exercises.hint: Past perfect continuous för pågående aktivitet fram till en punkt i det förflutna.
exercises.explanation: Past perfect continuous: had been writing – emphasises duration before publication.

exercises.instruction: Bygg meningen: 'Nästa år kommer hon att ha tagit examen.'
exercises.explanation: By next year, she will have graduated. – future perfect.

exercises.question: 'She looked tired because she ___ all night.' Choose the correct tense.
exercises.explanation: Past perfect continuous (had been studying) shows a prolonged past activity causing a past state.
exercises.hint: Past perfect continuous: förklara ett förflutet tillstånd med en pågående aktivitet.

helpText: Avancerade tempus – du lär dig skilja på händelser i tid med precision.
Past perfect: had + past participle – en handling FÄRDIG innan en annan preteritumshandling. Ex: 'She had already left when I arrived.'
Past continuous: was/were + -ing – pågående bakgrundshandling som avbryts. Ex: 'I was reading when the phone rang.'
Past perfect continuous: had been + -ing – pågående handling under en period i det förflutna. Ex: 'She had been working for six hours.'
Future perfect: will have + past participle – klart INNAN en framtida tidpunkt. Ex: 'By 2030, they will have finished the project.'
Tänk: Vilken händelse kom FÖRST? Den händelsen → past perfect.

grammar.title: Advanced Modal Verbs
grammar.description: Modalverb för slutledning, möjlighet och kritik av dåtid.

exercises.question: 'You ___ have told me earlier. I could have helped.' Which modal?
exercises.explanation: 'Should have + past participle' expresses criticism or regret about a past action.
exercises.hint: 'should have' = borde ha (kritik eller ånger om förflutet).

exercises.sentence: She ___ have left already — her coat is gone.
exercises.hint: Modal + have + particip: vilket modalverb passar för logisk slutledning/säkerhet?
exercises.explanation: 'Must have + past participle' = logical deduction about the past.

exercises.question: 'He ___ have taken the last bus — I'm not sure.' Which modal expresses possibility?
exercises.explanation: 'Might have + past participle' expresses possibility about the past.
exercises.hint: 'might have' = möjligen hände något i det förflutna.

exercises.sentence: You ___ have worried so much — everything is fine!
exercises.hint: Tänk: 'needn't have' vs 'didn't need to' – vilket antyder att du faktiskt gjorde det?
exercises.explanation: 'Needn't have + past participle' = it wasn't necessary (but you did it).

exercises.question: 'I wish I ___ taken the job.' Which form is correct?
exercises.explanation: 'I wish + past perfect' expresses regret about a past situation.
exercises.hint: 'I wish + past perfect' = ånger om förflutet.

exercises.sentence: She would rather ___ (stay) home than go to the party.
exercises.hint: 'would rather' + grundform (inte infinitiv med to).
exercises.explanation: 'Would rather' + base verb (without 'to').

exercises.instruction: Bygg meningen: 'Han måste ha glömt mötet.'
exercises.explanation: He must have forgotten the meeting. – 'must have' for past deduction.

exercises.question: 'You ___ park here — it's illegal!' Which modal expresses prohibition?
exercises.explanation: 'Mustn't' expresses prohibition (it is not allowed).
exercises.hint: 'mustn't' = förbjudet. Skilj från 'needn't' (onödigt).

exercises.sentence: She ___ have been lying — the evidence proved it.
exercises.hint: Modal + have + particip: vilket modalverb visar omöjlighet i dåtid?
exercises.explanation: 'Couldn't have + past participle' = it was impossible.

exercises.question: Which sentence expresses ability in the past?
options: She could swim when she was young.
exercises.explanation: 'Could' expresses past ability (was able to).
exercises.hint: 'could' = förmåga i det förflutna.

exercises.sentence: It ___ rain later — bring an umbrella just in case.
exercises.hint: Osäker möjlighet: vilket modalverb används för 'kanske' eller 'möjligen'?
exercises.explanation: 'Might' expresses uncertain possibility.

exercises.instruction: Bygg meningen: 'Jag borde ha studerat hårdare inför provet.'
exercises.explanation: I should have studied harder for the exam. – regret about the past.

exercises.question: 'By now, she ___ arrived in Tokyo.' Which modal expresses a confident deduction about the present?
exercises.explanation: 'Must have' shows confident logical deduction about a completed action.
exercises.hint: Säker logisk slutledning om förflutet: must have.

exercises.sentence: You ___ (have to) wear a suit — it's a casual event.
exercises.hint: Tänk: 'don't have to' = inte nödvändigt, 'must not' = förbjudet. Vilket passar?
exercises.explanation: 'Don't have to' = not necessary (different from 'mustn't' which is prohibition).

exercises.question: 'She ___ be at home — her lights are on.' Which modal fits best?
exercises.explanation: 'Must' for strong deduction based on evidence: lights are on → she must be home.
exercises.hint: Stark slutledning baserad på bevis: must.

helpText: Avancerade modalverb används för att uttrycka grader av säkerhet, möjlighet och kritik.
Slutledning om nu: must be (säker), could/might be (möjlig), can't be (omöjlig).
Slutledning om dåtid: must have + pp (säkert), could have + pp (möjligen), should have + pp (borde ha), needn't have + pp (behövde inte ha).
Ex: 'He must have forgotten.' (säker) / 'She might have left early.' (möjlig) / 'You should have told me.' (kritik)
Tänk: Hur säker är du? must (nästan 100%) → could/might (50%) → can't (0%).

grammar.title: The Subjunctive & Formal English

exercises.question: Which sentence uses the subjunctive correctly?
options: I suggest that she studies more.
I suggest that she study more.
I suggest that she should studying.
I suggest that she is studying.
exercises.explanation: The mandative subjunctive uses the base form after verbs like suggest, recommend, insist: 'she study' (not 'studies').
exercises.hint: Mandative subjunctive: after suggest/recommend + that-clause, use base verb.

exercises.sentence: The board recommended that the CEO ___ (resign) immediately.
exercises.hint: Subjunktiv: grundform utan -s efter 'recommend that'.
exercises.explanation: Mandative subjunctive: base form (resign) without -s, regardless of subject.

exercises.question: Which phrase is a formal alternative to 'sorry'?
exercises.explanation: 'Please accept my sincere apologies' is a formal expression of regret.
exercises.hint: Formella ursäkter: 'Please accept my apologies' / 'I sincerely apologise'.

exercises.sentence: If I ___ (be) you, I would reconsider. (Subjunctive/formal)
exercises.hint: Konjunktiv med 'If I were you': subjunktiv används för hypotetiska situationer. Vilket pronomen + form?
exercises.explanation: Subjunctive: 'were' for all persons in formal/literary conditional: If I were you.

exercises.question: Which is the most formal way to begin a letter?
exercises.explanation: 'Dear Sir or Madam,' is the formal salutation used when the recipient is unknown.
exercises.hint: Formell brevhälsning: Dear Sir or Madam,

exercises.sentence: The committee demanded that the report ___ (submit) by Friday.
exercises.hint: Mandative subjunctive i passiv: be + past participle.
exercises.explanation: Passive mandative subjunctive: demanded that + subject + be + past participle.

exercises.question: 'It is vital that every student ___ the examination.' Subjunctive?
exercises.explanation: After 'it is vital that', use base form (subjunctive): every student pass.
exercises.hint: After 'it is + adjective + that': use base form (subjunctive).

exercises.sentence: I would like to ___ my deepest gratitude for your assistance.
exercises.hint: Formellt uttryck: 'I would like to ___ my deepest gratitude' – vilket verb hör ihop?
exercises.explanation: Formal expression: 'I would like to express my deepest gratitude'.

exercises.instruction: Bygg meningen: 'Det är viktigt att varje medlem deltar i mötet.'
exercises.explanation: It is essential that every member attend the meeting. – mandative subjunctive (attend, not attends).

exercises.question: Which sentence uses the most formal register?
options: Can you send me the file?
Could you send me the file?
I was wondering if you might be able to send me the file.
exercises.explanation: Using tentative structures ('I was wondering if…') is the most polite/formal.
exercises.hint: Tentativa strukturer (I was wondering…) är mest formella.

exercises.sentence: Were he to arrive late, the meeting would start without him. (= If he ___ late...)
exercises.hint: 'Were + subject + to + infinitive' är en formell konditionalisstruktur.
exercises.explanation: 'Were he to arrive' is a formal inversion equivalent to 'If he arrived'.

exercises.question: '___ God save the Queen!' Which mood is this?
exercises.explanation: 'God save the Queen' is an optative subjunctive – expressing a wish or prayer.
exercises.hint: 'God save...' är en önskande/bedjande subjunktiv.

exercises.sentence: I would be most grateful if you ___ (could) forward the document at your earliest convenience.
exercises.hint: Formell förfrågan: 'I would be most grateful if you ___ forward...' – vilket modalverb?
exercises.explanation: Formal request: I would be most grateful if you could + base verb.

exercises.instruction: Bygg meningen: 'Jag undrade om du kunde hjälpa mig med den här frågan.'
exercises.explanation: I was wondering if you could assist me with this matter. – formal/polite register.

exercises.question: Which verb does NOT typically trigger the mandative subjunctive?
exercises.explanation: 'Think' does not trigger the mandative subjunctive. 'Recommend', 'insist', 'suggest' do.
exercises.hint: Mandative subjunctive triggas av: recommend, insist, suggest, demand, require, propose.

helpText: Konjunktiv (subjunctive) används i formellt och akademiskt språk för önskningar, krav och hypotetiska situationer.
Were-konjunktiv: 'If I were you, I would...' / 'I wish I were taller.' (alltid 'were', aldrig 'was' i formellt språk)
Formell that-konjunktiv (base form): 'The committee recommends that he apply for the post.' (inte 'applies')
Formella fraser: 'It is essential that...' / 'I suggest that...' / 'They demanded that...' + base form
Tips: I formella texter och tal – sättet konjunktiv signalerar sofistikerat språkbruk.

grammar.title: Cohesion & Discourse Markers
grammar.description: Konnektiv och kohesion — hur man skapar flöde i text.

exercises.question: Which word is a discourse marker that introduces a contrast?
exercises.explanation: 'However' introduces a contrast or counterargument.
exercises.hint: 'However' = kontrast/motargument.

exercises.sentence: The project was successful. ___, it took longer than expected.
exercises.hint: Vilket typ av kohesionssignal behövs här – kontrast, tillägg eller konsekvens?
exercises.explanation: 'However' signals a contrast between the two sentences.

exercises.question: Which sentence best uses a discourse marker to add information?
options: She is talented. However, she works hard.
She is talented. Furthermore, she works hard.
She is talented. Therefore, she works hard.
She is talented. In contrast, she works hard.
exercises.explanation: 'Furthermore' adds information/supports the previous point.
exercises.hint: 'Furthermore' / 'Moreover' / 'In addition' = lägger till information.

exercises.sentence: The weather was terrible. ___, we decided to cancel the trip.
exercises.hint: Meningen kräver ett kohesionssignal som visar konsekvens eller följd.
exercises.explanation: 'Therefore' shows cause and effect: bad weather → cancel the trip.

exercises.question: '___ her lack of experience, she performed brilliantly.' Which cohesion device?
exercises.explanation: 'Despite' + noun phrase shows contrast without a full clause.
exercises.hint: 'Despite' + substantivfras = trots (utan fullständig sats).

exercises.sentence: Prices have risen. ___ ___, consumer spending has fallen.
exercises.hint: Meningen kräver en fras som visar orsak och verkan.
exercises.explanation: 'As a result' shows the consequence of rising prices.

exercises.instruction: Bygg meningen: 'Även om filmen var lång, var den väldigt underhållande.'
exercises.explanation: Although the film was long, it was very entertaining. – concession with 'although'.

exercises.question: Which discourse marker is used to introduce an example?
exercises.explanation: 'For instance' (= 'for example') introduces an illustrative example.
exercises.hint: 'For instance' / 'For example' / 'Such as' = ger exempel.

exercises.sentence: The new policy has many advantages. ___, it reduces costs and improves efficiency.
exercises.hint: Meningen kräver ett uttryck som introducerar ett konkret exempel.
exercises.explanation: 'For example' introduces an illustration of the stated advantages.

exercises.question: Which sentence uses a reference word (cohesive device) correctly?
options: Maria passed the exam. She was delighted with this result.
Maria passed the exam. He was delighted with this result.
Maria passed the exam. It was delighted with this result.
Maria passed the exam. They was delighted with this result.
exercises.explanation: 'She' refers back to 'Maria'; 'this result' refers back to 'the exam result'.
exercises.hint: Referensord ska stämma i kön och antal med det de syftar på.

exercises.sentence: He trained every day. ___, he won the championship.
exercises.hint: Meningen kräver ett ord som visar konsekvens.
exercises.explanation: 'Consequently' shows the result of daily training.

exercises.question: Which word best signals a summary or conclusion?
exercises.explanation: 'In conclusion' signals the final summary of an essay or argument.
exercises.hint: 'In conclusion' / 'To summarise' = sammanfattning.

exercises.sentence: The two proposals differ significantly. The first focuses on cost reduction; ___, the second prioritises quality.
exercises.hint: Meningen kräver en konjunktion för att visa jämförande kontrast.
exercises.explanation: 'Whereas' introduces a contrasting idea within the same sentence.

exercises.instruction: Bygg meningarna: 'Maten var utmärkt. Dessutom var servicen oklanderlig.'
exercises.explanation: The food was excellent. Moreover, the service was impeccable. – addition marker.

exercises.question: 'The plan was approved. ___, it was implemented immediately.' Which marker shows sequence?
exercises.explanation: 'Subsequently' means 'after that' – it shows temporal sequence.
exercises.hint: 'Subsequently' / 'Then' / 'Afterwards' = sedan, därefter (tidssekvens).

helpText: Diskursmarkörer (cohesion devices) skapar logik, flöde och sammanhang i din text.
Addition: furthermore, moreover, in addition, what is more – lägger till argument.
Kontrast: however, nevertheless, on the other hand, in contrast, yet – kontrasterar argument.
Orsak/verkan: therefore, consequently, as a result, thus, hence – visar logisk följd.
Exempel: for instance, for example, such as, namely, to illustrate.
Tips: Välj konnektiv utifrån LOGIKEN – lägger du till (moreover), kontrasterar du (however), eller förklarar du (therefore)?

grammar.title: Advanced grammar
grammar.description: Inversioner, subjunktiv, avancerade relativ- och prepositionsfraser.

exercises.sentence: Had I known, I ___ (act) differently.
exercises.hint: Typ 3-konditionalis i resultatsatsen: vilket modalverb + konstruktion används för en omöjlig situation i dåtid?

exercises.question: She insisted that he ___ immediately.
exercises.hint: Konjunktiv: grundformen används (utan -s) för alla pronomen. T.ex. 'it is essential that she be present'.

exercises.sentence: The results ___ (analyse) carefully before publication.
exercises.hint: Passiv form: was/were + perfektparticip. Subjektet utsätts för handlingen snarare än utför den.

exercises.question: No sooner ___ he arrived than it started to rain.
exercises.hint: Inversion: när ett negativt/begränsande adverbial inleder meningen → hjälpverb + subjekt. T.ex. 'Seldom do we see...' (ej 'we see').

exercises.sentence: It is essential that she ___ (be) present.
exercises.hint: Konjunktiv: efter 'it is vital/crucial/essential/important that' → verbets grundform

exercises.question: The proposal was rejected, ___ surprised everyone.
exercises.hint: Tänk på den avancerade grammatikregeln: inversion, konjunktiv, passiv, gerund eller konditionalis?

exercises.sentence: He denied ___ (take) the money.
exercises.hint: Gerund (-ing): vilka verb följs av gerundium? Titta på verbet precis före luckan.

exercises.question: Rarely ___ such dedication.
exercises.hint: Inversion: när ett negativt/begränsande adverbial inleder meningen → hjälpverb + subjekt. T.ex. 'Seldom do we see...' (ej 'we see').

exercises.sentence: She would rather ___ (stay) home.
exercises.hint: Tänk på den avancerade grammatikregeln: inversion, konjunktiv, passiv, gerund eller konditionalis?

exercises.question: The book, ___ was published in 1920, is still relevant.
exercises.hint: Tänk på den avancerade grammatikregeln: inversion, konjunktiv, passiv, gerund eller konditionalis?

exercises.sentence: Scarcely ___ they finished when the bell rang.
exercises.hint: Inversion: när ett negativt/begränsande adverbial inleder meningen → hjälpverb + subjekt. T.ex. 'Seldom do we see...' (ej 'we see').

exercises.question: He is capable ___ solving complex problems.
exercises.hint: Fast prepositionsfras: lär dig vilka prepositioner som hör ihop med olika adjektiv (capable of, afraid of, good at...).

exercises.sentence: The theory has been widely ___ (criticise).
exercises.hint: Tänk på den avancerade grammatikregeln: inversion, konjunktiv, passiv, gerund eller konditionalis?

exercises.question: Neither the teacher nor the students ___ aware.
exercises.hint: 'Neither of' + plural substantiv tar ändå singular verb (is/was) i formellt skriftspråk.

exercises.sentence: She suggested that he ___ (apply) for the position.
exercises.hint: Tänk på den avancerade grammatikregeln: inversion, konjunktiv, passiv, gerund eller konditionalis?

exercises.question: Hardly ever ___ such chaos.
exercises.hint: Inversion: när ett negativt/begränsande adverbial inleder meningen → hjälpverb + subjekt. T.ex. 'Seldom do we see...' (ej 'we see').

exercises.sentence: The data needs ___ (verify).
exercises.hint: Passiv infinitiv: verbet behöver en konstruktion med 'to be' följt av particip.

exercises.question: He objected ___ the decision.
exercises.hint: Tänk på den avancerade grammatikregeln: inversion, konjunktiv, passiv, gerund eller konditionalis?

exercises.sentence: Not until later ___ they realise the truth.
exercises.hint: Inversion: när ett negativt/begränsande adverbial inleder meningen → hjälpverb + subjekt. T.ex. 'Seldom do we see...' (ej 'we see').

exercises.question: She is regarded ___ an expert.
exercises.hint: Tänk på den avancerade grammatikregeln: inversion, konjunktiv, passiv, gerund eller konditionalis?

helpText: Avancerade grammatikstrukturer – inversion, relativa pronomen, prepositionsfraser.
Inversion: I formellt/stilistiskt språk vänds ordföljden. Ex: 'Never have I seen such beauty.' / 'Rarely does she complain.'
Relativa pronomen: who (subjekt/objekt, person), whom (objekt, formellt), whose (ägande), which (sak).
Ex: 'The professor, whose research I admire, gave a lecture.' (inskjuten bisats)
Tips: Inversion sker ofta efter negativa adverb: never, rarely, seldom, hardly, not only.

grammar.title: Advanced grammar – del 2
grammar.description: Fler övningar på inversion, subjunktiv och avancerade strukturer.

exercises.sentence: Had she known, she ___ (act) differently.
exercises.hint: Typ 3-konditionalis i resultatsatsen: vilket modalverb + konstruktion används för en omöjlig situation i dåtid?

exercises.question: It is vital that he ___ informed.
exercises.hint: Konjunktiv: efter 'it is vital/crucial/essential/important that' → verbets grundform för alla pronomen.

exercises.sentence: The results ___ (publish) next week.
exercises.hint: Tänk på den avancerade grammatikregeln: inversion, konjunktiv, passiv, gerund eller konditionalis?

exercises.question: Only then ___ we understand the problem.
exercises.hint: Tänk på den avancerade grammatikregeln: inversion, konjunktiv, passiv, gerund eller konditionalis?

exercises.sentence: She denied ___ (cheat) on the exam.
exercises.hint: Gerund (-ing): vilka verb följs av gerundium? Titta på verbet precis före luckan.

exercises.question: Rarely ___ such dedication.
exercises.hint: Inversion: när ett negativt/begränsande adverbial inleder meningen → hjälpverb + subjekt. T.ex. 'Seldom do we see...' (ej 'we see').

exercises.sentence: He would rather ___ (leave) early.
exercises.hint: Tänk på den avancerade grammatikregeln: inversion, konjunktiv, passiv, gerund eller konditionalis?

exercises.question: The theory, ___ was controversial, gained support.
exercises.hint: Tänk på den avancerade grammatikregeln: inversion, konjunktiv, passiv, gerund eller konditionalis?

exercises.sentence: Scarcely ___ they arrived when it started to snow.
exercises.hint: Inversion: när ett negativt/begränsande adverbial inleder meningen → hjälpverb + subjekt. T.ex. 'Seldom do we see...' (ej 'we see').

exercises.question: She objected ___ the proposal.
exercises.hint: Tänk på den avancerade grammatikregeln: inversion, konjunktiv, passiv, gerund eller konditionalis?

exercises.sentence: The essay needs ___ (revise).
exercises.hint: Passiv infinitiv: verbet behöver en konstruktion med 'to be' följt av particip.

exercises.question: Neither the students nor the teacher ___ prepared.
exercises.hint: 'Neither of' + plural substantiv tar ändå singular verb (is/was) i formellt skriftspråk.

exercises.sentence: He suggested that she ___ (apply).
exercises.hint: Tänk på den avancerade grammatikregeln: inversion, konjunktiv, passiv, gerund eller konditionalis?

exercises.question: Hardly ever ___ we experienced such chaos.
exercises.hint: Inversion: när ett negativt/begränsande adverbial inleder meningen → hjälpverb + subjekt. T.ex. 'Seldom do we see...' (ej 'we see').

exercises.sentence: The data ___ (analyse) thoroughly.
exercises.hint: Passiv form: was/were + perfektparticip. Subjektet utsätts för handlingen snarare än utför den.

exercises.question: She is regarded ___ a leading expert.
exercises.hint: Tänk på den avancerade grammatikregeln: inversion, konjunktiv, passiv, gerund eller konditionalis?

exercises.sentence: Not until later ___ they realise the truth.
exercises.hint: Inversion: när ett negativt/begränsande adverbial inleder meningen → hjälpverb + subjekt. T.ex. 'Seldom do we see...' (ej 'we see').

exercises.question: He insisted that she ___ immediately.
exercises.hint: Konjunktiv: grundformen används (utan -s) för alla pronomen. T.ex. 'it is essential that she be present'.

exercises.sentence: The proposal ___ (reject) last year.
exercises.hint: Passiv form: was/were + perfektparticip. Subjektet utsätts för handlingen snarare än utför den.

exercises.question: Were I you, I ___ reconsider.
exercises.hint: Tänk på den avancerade grammatikregeln: inversion, konjunktiv, passiv, gerund eller konditionalis?

helpText: Fler avancerade strukturer – fokusera på meningsbyggnad och stil.
Avancerade konditionalis: Typ 3 (hade hänt men hände inte): If + had + pp, would have + pp.
Ex: 'If she had studied harder, she would have passed the exam.'
Mixed conditionals: blandar typ 2 och 3. Ex: 'If I had taken that job, I would be rich now.'
Tips: Typ 3 = ångrar något i dåtiden. Mixed = dåtid påverkar nutid.

grammar.title: Advanced grammar – del 3
grammar.description: Ännu fler övningar på inversion, subjunktiv och avancerade strukturer.

exercises.sentence: Had I realised, I ___ (act) sooner.
exercises.hint: Typ 3-konditionalis i resultatsatsen: vilket modalverb + konstruktion används för en omöjlig situation i dåtid?

exercises.question: It is essential that he ___ present.
exercises.hint: Konjunktiv: efter 'it is vital/crucial/essential/important that' → verbets grundform för alla pronomen.

exercises.sentence: The article ___ (publish) next week.
exercises.hint: Tänk på den avancerade grammatikregeln: inversion, konjunktiv, passiv, gerund eller konditionalis?

exercises.question: Only later ___ they understand.
exercises.hint: Tänk på den avancerade grammatikregeln: inversion, konjunktiv, passiv, gerund eller konditionalis?

exercises.sentence: She denied ___ (steal) the money.
exercises.hint: Gerund (-ing): vilka verb följs av gerundium? Titta på verbet precis före luckan.

exercises.question: Rarely ___ such dedication.
exercises.hint: Inversion: när ett negativt/begränsande adverbial inleder meningen → hjälpverb + subjekt. T.ex. 'Seldom do we see...' (ej 'we see').

exercises.sentence: He would rather ___ (stay) home.
exercises.hint: Tänk på den avancerade grammatikregeln: inversion, konjunktiv, passiv, gerund eller konditionalis?

exercises.question: The theory, ___ was controversial, gained support.
exercises.hint: Tänk på den avancerade grammatikregeln: inversion, konjunktiv, passiv, gerund eller konditionalis?

exercises.sentence: Scarcely ___ they arrived when it started raining.
exercises.hint: Inversion: när ett negativt/begränsande adverbial inleder meningen → hjälpverb + subjekt. T.ex. 'Seldom do we see...' (ej 'we see').

exercises.question: She objected ___ the decision.
exercises.hint: Tänk på den avancerade grammatikregeln: inversion, konjunktiv, passiv, gerund eller konditionalis?

exercises.sentence: The essay needs ___ (edit).
exercises.hint: Passiv infinitiv: verbet behöver en konstruktion med 'to be' följt av particip.

exercises.question: Neither the students nor the teacher ___ aware.
exercises.hint: 'Neither of' + plural substantiv tar ändå singular verb (is/was) i formellt skriftspråk.

exercises.sentence: He suggested that she ___ (apply).
exercises.hint: Tänk på den avancerade grammatikregeln: inversion, konjunktiv, passiv, gerund eller konditionalis?

exercises.question: Hardly ever ___ we seen such chaos.
exercises.hint: Inversion: när ett negativt/begränsande adverbial inleder meningen → hjälpverb + subjekt. T.ex. 'Seldom do we see...' (ej 'we see').

exercises.sentence: The data ___ (analyse) carefully.
exercises.hint: Passiv form: was/were + perfektparticip. Subjektet utsätts för handlingen snarare än utför den.

exercises.question: She is regarded ___ an expert.
exercises.hint: Tänk på den avancerade grammatikregeln: inversion, konjunktiv, passiv, gerund eller konditionalis?

exercises.sentence: Not until later ___ they realise the truth.
exercises.hint: Inversion: när ett negativt/begränsande adverbial inleder meningen → hjälpverb + subjekt. T.ex. 'Seldom do we see...' (ej 'we see').

exercises.question: He insisted that she ___ immediately.
exercises.hint: Konjunktiv: grundformen används (utan -s) för alla pronomen. T.ex. 'it is essential that she be present'.

exercises.sentence: The proposal ___ (reject) last year.
exercises.hint: Passiv form: was/were + perfektparticip. Subjektet utsätts för handlingen snarare än utför den.

exercises.question: Were I you, I ___ reconsider.
exercises.hint: Tänk på den avancerade grammatikregeln: inversion, konjunktiv, passiv, gerund eller konditionalis?

exercises.sentence: The research ___ (conduct) over five years.
exercises.hint: Passiv form: was/were + perfektparticip. Subjektet utsätts för handlingen snarare än utför den.

exercises.question: It was the first time she ___ abroad.
exercises.hint: Tänk på den avancerade grammatikregeln: inversion, konjunktiv, passiv, gerund eller konditionalis?

exercises.sentence: No sooner ___ he arrived than it began.
exercises.hint: Inversion: när ett negativt/begränsande adverbial inleder meningen → hjälpverb + subjekt. T.ex. 'Seldom do we see...' (ej 'we see').

exercises.question: She is capable ___ solving the problem.
exercises.hint: Fast prepositionsfras: lär dig vilka prepositioner som hör ihop med olika adjektiv (capable of, afraid of, good at...).

exercises.sentence: The findings ___ (present) at the conference.
exercises.hint: Passiv form: was/were + perfektparticip. Subjektet utsätts för handlingen snarare än utför den.

exercises.question: Only by working hard ___ success achieved.
exercises.hint: Tänk på den avancerade grammatikregeln: inversion, konjunktiv, passiv, gerund eller konditionalis?

exercises.sentence: He admitted ___ (break) the rule.
exercises.hint: Gerund (-ing): vilka verb följs av gerundium? Titta på verbet precis före luckan.

exercises.question: Seldom ___ we encounter such talent.
exercises.hint: Inversion: när ett negativt/begränsande adverbial inleder meningen → hjälpverb + subjekt. T.ex. 'Seldom do we see...' (ej 'we see').

exercises.sentence: The contract ___ (sign) yesterday.
exercises.hint: Passiv form: was/were + perfektparticip. Subjektet utsätts för handlingen snarare än utför den.

exercises.question: She would have succeeded if she ___ harder.
exercises.hint: Tänk på den avancerade grammatikregeln: inversion, konjunktiv, passiv, gerund eller konditionalis?

helpText: Ännu fler avancerade strukturer – du är på gymnasienivå, var präcis och nyanserad!
Nominalisering: verbhandlingar omvandlas till substantiv för formellt språk. 'The company decided' → 'The company's decision'.
Klyvsatser (cleft sentences): 'It was John who broke the window.' (fokuserar på John)
Tips: Nominalisering gör texten mer akademisk och objektiv.

grammar.title: Avancerad grammatik – del 4

exercises.sentence: Had I known, I ___ (act) differently.
exercises.hint: Typ 3-konditionalis i resultatsatsen: vilket modalverb + konstruktion används för en omöjlig situation i dåtid?

exercises.sentence: It is essential that she ___ (be) present.
exercises.hint: Konjunktiv: efter 'it is vital/crucial/essential/important that' → verbets grundform

exercises.sentence: The results ___ (publish) next week.
exercises.hint: Tänk på den avancerade grammatikregeln: inversion, konjunktiv, passiv, gerund eller konditionalis?

exercises.sentence: Rarely ___ we see such talent.
exercises.hint: Inversion: när ett negativt/begränsande adverbial inleder meningen → hjälpverb + subjekt. T.ex. 'Seldom do we see...' (ej 'we see').

exercises.sentence: She denied ___ (take) the money.
exercises.hint: Gerund (-ing): vilka verb följs av gerundium? Titta på verbet precis före luckan.

exercises.sentence: The theory, which ___ (be) controversial, gained support.
exercises.hint: Tänk på den avancerade grammatikregeln: inversion, konjunktiv, passiv, gerund eller konditionalis?

exercises.sentence: He would rather ___ (stay) home.
exercises.hint: Tänk på den avancerade grammatikregeln: inversion, konjunktiv, passiv, gerund eller konditionalis?

exercises.sentence: The essay needs ___ (revise).
exercises.hint: Passiv infinitiv: verbet behöver en konstruktion med 'to be' följt av particip.

exercises.sentence: Neither the teacher nor the students ___ aware.
exercises.hint: 'Neither of' + plural substantiv tar ändå singular verb (is/was) i formellt skriftspråk.

exercises.sentence: He suggested that she ___ (apply).
exercises.hint: Tänk på den avancerade grammatikregeln: inversion, konjunktiv, passiv, gerund eller konditionalis?

exercises.sentence: The data ___ (analyse) carefully.
exercises.hint: Passiv form: was/were + perfektparticip. Subjektet utsätts för handlingen snarare än utför den.

exercises.sentence: Not until later ___ they realise the truth.
exercises.hint: Inversion: när ett negativt/begränsande adverbial inleder meningen → hjälpverb + subjekt. T.ex. 'Seldom do we see...' (ej 'we see').

exercises.sentence: She is regarded ___ an expert.
exercises.hint: Tänk på den avancerade grammatikregeln: inversion, konjunktiv, passiv, gerund eller konditionalis?

exercises.sentence: Only then ___ we understand the problem.
exercises.hint: Tänk på den avancerade grammatikregeln: inversion, konjunktiv, passiv, gerund eller konditionalis?

exercises.sentence: The contract ___ (sign) yesterday.
exercises.hint: Passiv form: was/were + perfektparticip. Subjektet utsätts för handlingen snarare än utför den.

exercises.sentence: It was the first time she ___ (travel) abroad.
exercises.hint: Tänk på den avancerade grammatikregeln: inversion, konjunktiv, passiv, gerund eller konditionalis?

exercises.sentence: Scarcely ___ they arrived when it started to rain.
exercises.hint: Inversion: när ett negativt/begränsande adverbial inleder meningen → hjälpverb + subjekt. T.ex. 'Seldom do we see...' (ej 'we see').

exercises.sentence: He objected ___ the proposal.
exercises.hint: Tänk på den avancerade grammatikregeln: inversion, konjunktiv, passiv, gerund eller konditionalis?

exercises.sentence: Were I you, I ___ reconsider.
exercises.hint: Tänk på den avancerade grammatikregeln: inversion, konjunktiv, passiv, gerund eller konditionalis?

exercises.sentence: She insisted that he ___ (leave) immediately.
exercises.hint: Konjunktiv: grundformen används (utan -s) för alla pronomen. T.ex. 'it is essential that she be present'.

helpText: Avancerade grammatikövningar på gymnasienivå.
Passiv rapportering: 'It is believed that...', 'He is said to...', 'They are thought to have...'
Ex: 'Scientists believe the drug is effective.' → 'The drug is believed to be effective.'
Tips: Passiv rapportering används i akademiska och journalistiska texter för att distansera sig från påståendet.

grammar.title: Avancerad grammatik – del 5

exercises.question: Had they prepared better, they ___ succeeded.
exercises.hint: Typ 3-konditionalis i resultatsatsen: vilket modalverb + konstruktion används för en omöjlig situation i dåtid?

exercises.sentence: It is crucial that he ___ (understand) the risks.
exercises.hint: Konjunktiv: efter 'it is vital/crucial/essential/important that' → verbets grundform för alla pronomen.

exercises.question: Only after the meeting ___ we realise the problem.
exercises.hint: Inversion: när ett negativt/begränsande adverbial inleder meningen → hjälpverb + subjekt. T.ex. 'Seldom do we see...' (ej 'we see').

exercises.sentence: The manuscript ___ (review) before publication.
exercises.hint: Passiv form: was/were + perfektparticip. Subjektet utsätts för handlingen snarare än utför den.

exercises.question: No sooner ___ she left than it started raining.
exercises.hint: Inversion: när ett negativt/begränsande adverbial inleder meningen → hjälpverb + subjekt. T.ex. 'Seldom do we see...' (ej 'we see').

exercises.sentence: He admitted ___ (lie) to the teacher.
exercises.hint: Gerund (-ing): vilka verb följs av gerundium? Titta på verbet precis före luckan.

exercises.question: Seldom ___ such innovation.
exercises.hint: Inversion: när ett negativt/begränsande adverbial inleder meningen → hjälpverb + subjekt. T.ex. 'Seldom do we see...' (ej 'we see').

exercises.sentence: The issue needs ___ (address) immediately.
exercises.hint: Passiv infinitiv: verbet behöver en konstruktion med 'to be' följt av particip.

exercises.question: Neither of the answers ___ correct.
exercises.hint: 'Neither of' + plural substantiv tar ändå singular verb (is/was) i formellt skriftspråk.

exercises.sentence: She recommended that he ___ (seek) advice.
exercises.hint: Konjunktiv: grundformen används (utan -s) för alla pronomen. T.ex. 'it is essential that she be present'.

exercises.question: Under no circumstances ___ this be tolerated.
exercises.hint: Inversion: när ett negativt/begränsande adverbial inleder meningen → hjälpverb + subjekt. T.ex. 'Seldom do we see...' (ej 'we see').

exercises.sentence: The results ___ (interpret) differently by researchers.
exercises.hint: Passiv form: was/were + perfektparticip. Subjektet utsätts för handlingen snarare än utför den.

exercises.question: It was not until later that she ___ the truth.
exercises.hint: Inversion: när ett negativt/begränsande adverbial inleder meningen → hjälpverb + subjekt. T.ex. 'Seldom do we see...' (ej 'we see').

exercises.sentence: He is capable ___ handling complex tasks.
exercises.hint: Fast prepositionsfras: lär dig vilka prepositioner som hör ihop med olika adjektiv (capable of, afraid of, good at...).

exercises.question: Little ___ about the consequences.
exercises.hint: Inversion: när ett negativt/begränsande adverbial inleder meningen → hjälpverb + subjekt. T.ex. 'Seldom do we see...' (ej 'we see').

exercises.sentence: The proposal ___ (approve) unanimously.
exercises.hint: Passiv form: was/were + perfektparticip. Subjektet utsätts för handlingen snarare än utför den.

exercises.question: Were it not for her help, we ___ failed.
exercises.hint: Typ 3-konditionalis i resultatsatsen: vilket modalverb + konstruktion används för en omöjlig situation i dåtid?

exercises.sentence: The data appears ___ (be) inaccurate.
exercises.hint: Infinitiv: verbet 'appear/seem' följs av 'to be'. T.ex. 'The data appears to be inaccurate.'

exercises.question: He spoke as if he ___ everything.
exercises.hint: 'As if' + konjunktiv: 'knew' visar att situationen är osann/hypotetisk.

exercises.sentence: The experiment ___ (conduct) under strict conditions.
exercises.hint: Passiv form: was/were + perfektparticip. Subjektet utsätts för handlingen snarare än utför den.

helpText: Sista avancerade grammatikövningen – kombinera alla strukturer!
Tänk igenom: Vilket tempus? Aktiv eller passiv? Konnektiv? Inversion?
I avancerat engelskt skrivande är VARIATIONEN viktig – blanda meningstyper och strukturer.
Tips: Läs varje mening högt i huvudet – låter det naturligt och precist på engelska?

grammar.title: Blandad grammatik
grammar.description: Passiv rapportering, nominalisering, inversion, klyvsatser, modala perfektformer och mer.

exercises.sentence: She has been working here ___ 2015.
exercises.hint: Tänk: är tidsuttrycket en period (hur länge?) eller en startpunkt (sedan när)?

exercises.sentence: She has been working here ___ ten years.
exercises.hint: Tänk: är tidsuttrycket en period (hur länge?) eller en startpunkt (sedan när)?

exercises.sentence: The company is ___ to be successful.
exercises.hint: Passiv rapportering: 'They say that...' → 'It is said that...' / 'The company is said to...'

exercises.sentence: His ___ to cooperate surprised everyone.
exercises.hint: Nominalisering: vilket substantiv bildas av det verb som syns i meningen?

exercises.question: She spoke ___ confidently.
exercises.hint: 'Very' + adverb = mycket. 'Highly' används med vissa adjektiv (highly qualified, highly unlikely) men inte med adverb som 'confidently'.

exercises.sentence: Only after the exam ___ she realise her mistake.
exercises.hint: Inversion med 'Only after...': vilket hjälpverb hör till subjektet i den inverterade satsen?

exercises.sentence: In spite of ___ tired, he continued.
exercises.hint: 'In spite of' följs av gerundium. Vilken form av verbet ska användas?

exercises.sentence: She ___ have forgotten (possibility).
exercises.hint: Vilket modalverb passar för att uttrycka en möjlighet (inte säkerhet)?

exercises.sentence: The issue needs ___ (address) urgently.
exercises.hint: Passiv infinitiv: 'needs + to be + perfektparticip' – vad är particip av 'address'?

exercises.sentence: ___ I need is more time.
exercises.hint: Det här är en klyvsats (cleft sentence). Vilket ord inleder vanligtvis en klyvsats som fokuserar på ett objekt?

exercises.question: The results were discussed ___ detail.
exercises.hint: Fast prepositionsfras: 'in detail' = i detalj/utförligt. 'At' passar inte här. Lär dig fasta fraser: in detail, in general, in public.

exercises.sentence: She suggested ___ (leave) early.
exercises.hint: Gerund efter 'suggest': 'suggest doing'. Inte 'suggest to do'! Andra verb + gerund: admit, avoid, consider, deny, enjoy, finish, mind.

exercises.sentence: If he were more careful, he ___ avoid mistakes.
exercises.hint: Typ 2-konditionalis: vilket modalverb används i huvudsatsen?

exercises.sentence: He is ___ to be honest.
exercises.hint: Passiv rapportering: 'People think he is...' → 'He is ___ to be...' – vilket verb?

exercises.question: She is responsible ___ the project.
exercises.hint: Fast prepositionsfras: 'responsible for' (ansvarig för). 'Capable of', 'aware of', 'responsible for' – lär dig vilken preposition som hör till vilket adjektiv.

exercises.sentence: The data seems ___ (be) incorrect.
exercises.hint: 'Seem/appear' + infinitiv: vilket ord inleder infinitiv?

exercises.sentence: They conducted an ___ into the matter.
exercises.hint: Nominalisering: vilket substantiv bildas av det verb som syns i meningen?

exercises.sentence: Never ___ I seen such chaos.
exercises.hint: Inversion med negativt adverbial: vilket hjälpverb hör till subjektet i denna mening?

exercises.sentence: He is not old ___ to vote.
exercises.hint: Jämför: 'too [adjektiv] to' omvandlas till 'not [adjektiv] ___ to'. Vilket ord saknas?

exercises.sentence: They ___ have missed the train (certainty).
exercises.hint: Vilket modalverb passar för att uttrycka en logisk slutsats om något som har hänt?

helpText: Blandad avancerad grammatik – maximalt fokus krävs!
Passiv rapportering: 'It is said that...', 'She is thought to be...'
Nominalisering: 'decide' → 'decision', 'develop' → 'development', 'analyse' → 'analysis'.
Klyvsats: 'It is the methodology that needs revision.' – lyfter fram viktigt element.
Modala perfektformer: 'should have', 'could have', 'must have' – slutledning om dåtid.
Tips: I avancerat engelskt skrivande varierar du strukturerna – undvik alltid börja med 'I'.

grammar.title: Sluttest – Grammatik
grammar.description: Testa allt du lärt dig i grammatikdelen! 32 blandade frågor.
helpText: Det här är sluttestet för hela grammatikdelen!
Frågorna täcker allt du tränat på: avancerade verb tider, modalverb, konjunktiv, diskursmarkörer, inversion och formellt språk.
Svara på alla 32 frågor och se hur bra du är. Du behöver minst 60% rätt för att klara testet!

exercises.question: Välj rätt: 'You ___ have told me earlier!' (förebråelse om det förflutna)
exercises.explanation: 'Should have' + past participle uttrycker förebråelse om något som borde ha gjorts.

exercises.question: Välj rätt: 'By now, she ___ have arrived.' (säkerhet om nuet)
exercises.explanation: 'Must have' + past participle uttrycker säker slutledning om nuet eller det förflutna.

exercises.question: Konjunktiv: 'It is essential that he ___ present at the meeting.'
exercises.explanation: Konjunktiv (subjunctive) används efter 'it is essential/important/vital that'. Formen är grundform.

exercises.question: Konjunktiv: 'If I ___ you, I would apologize immediately.'
exercises.explanation: I hypotetiska konditionalis (typ 2) används 'were' för alla personer (formellt). If I were you.

exercises.question: Diskursmarkör (kontrast): '___, many people struggle with mental health.'
exercises.explanation: 'Nowadays' introducerar en tidsmässig kontext om nutiden. Nowadays, many people struggle...

exercises.question: Diskursmarkör: 'The project was well planned. ___, it failed to meet its deadlines.'
exercises.explanation: 'Nevertheless' uttrycker kontrast/trots allt. Det project misslyckades trots god planering.

exercises.question: Inversion: 'Only then ___ she realize her mistake.'
exercises.explanation: Negativ inversion med 'Only then': Only then + hjälpverb + subjekt. Only then did she realize.

exercises.question: Passiv – Future Perfect: 'The contract ___ by the end of the week.'
exercises.explanation: Passiv i futurum: will be + past participle. The contract will be signed.

exercises.question: Blandat konditionalis: 'If she ___ the job, she would be working there now.'
exercises.explanation: Blandat konditionalis: If + past perfect (om det förflutna), would + nu (om nuet).

exercises.question: Perfekt infinitiv: 'She appears ___ the answer all along.'
exercises.explanation: 'To have known' (perfekt infinitiv) indikerar att kunskapen gäller ett förflutet tillstånd.

exercises.question: Konjunktiv i indirekt tal: 'He demanded that she ___ on time.'
exercises.explanation: Konjunktiv efter 'demand that': He demanded that she be on time. (grundform)

exercises.question: Relativklausul: 'The man, ___ I met yesterday, is a doctor.'
exercises.explanation: 'Whom' används som objekt i relativsatsen (formellt). The man, whom I met...

exercises.question: Relativklausul: 'The film, ___ I found rather dull, won several awards.'
exercises.explanation: 'Which' används om saker/fenomen (ej personer). The film, which I found dull...

exercises.question: Emfatisk 'do': 'I ___ want to help, but I was too busy.'
exercises.explanation: Emfatisk 'did' förstärker ett påstående om det förflutna. I did want to help.

exercises.question: Ellips/substitution: 'John likes jazz and so ___ Mary.'
exercises.explanation: 'So does' används för att bekräfta att samma sak gäller (med he/she/it). So does Mary.

exercises.question: Future Perfect: 'By this time tomorrow, she ___ her exam.'
exercises.explanation: Future Perfect: will have + past participle. She will have finished her exam.

exercises.question: Typ 3-konditionalis: 'Had I known earlier, I ___ differently.'
exercises.explanation: Typ 3: If I had known = Had I known. Följdsats: would have + past participle.

exercises.question: Nominalisering: 'The ___ of the new policy caused controversy.' (introduce)
exercises.explanation: Nominalisering: verbet 'introduce' → substantivet 'introduction'. Typiskt i akademiskt skrivande.

exercises.question: Modal past – omöjlighet: 'She ___ have forgotten – she never forgets anything.'
exercises.explanation: 'Can't have' + past participle uttrycker att något omöjligen kan ha hänt.

exercises.question: Inversion: 'Never ___ I seen such a beautiful painting.'
exercises.explanation: 'Never have I' – inversion med present perfect. Never have I seen such beauty.

exercises.question: Cleft-mening: 'It was ___ who first described the theory.'
exercises.explanation: Cleft-meningar lyfter fram ett specifikt element. It was Einstein who first described it.

exercises.question: Diskursmarkör (slutsats): '___, we must take immediate action on climate change.'
exercises.explanation: 'To conclude' signalerar att en slutsats presenteras. Typisk markör i formella texter.

exercises.sentence: It is vital that every student ___ present at the ceremony.
exercises.explanation: Konjunktiv efter 'it is vital that': grundform av verbet. Be present.

exercises.sentence: If I ___ in charge, I would change everything. (konjunktiv)
exercises.explanation: I hypotetiska konditionalis används 'were' för alla personer (formellt). If I were.

exercises.sentence: By next year, she will ___ completed the course.
exercises.explanation: Future Perfect: will have + past participle. Will have completed.

exercises.sentence: The problem, ___ affects millions of people, needs urgent attention.
exercises.explanation: 'Which' används i icke-restriktiv relativsats om ett fenomen/sak.

exercises.sentence: Only when she left ___ he realize how much she meant to him.
exercises.explanation: Inversion med 'only when': Only when + sats + hjälpverb + subjekt. Only when she left did he realize.

exercises.sentence: Not only ___ she win the race, but she also set a new record.
exercises.explanation: Inversion med 'not only': Not only did she win... (hjälpverb + subjekt)

exercises.sentence: She demanded that he ___ her an explanation immediately.
exercises.explanation: Konjunktiv efter 'demand that': She demanded that he give. (grundform, ej gives)

exercises.sentence: The report must ___ submitted by all students before Friday.
exercises.explanation: Passiv modal konstruktion: must + be + past participle. Must be submitted.

exercises.sentence: He seems to ___ known about this for years. (perfekt infinitiv)
exercises.explanation: Perfekt infinitiv: to + have + past participle. To have known.

exercises.sentence: Such was her talent ___ she won every competition she entered.
exercises.explanation: 'Such...that' är en resultatkonstruktion. Such was her talent that she won everything.

reading.title: Artificial Intelligence: Promise and Peril
reading.description: En analytisk text om AI:s möjligheter och etiska utmaningar.
reading.text:
The rapid advancement of artificial intelligence represents perhaps the most significant technological shift since the Industrial Revolution. From diagnosing cancer more accurately than oncologists to generating fluent text and realistic images, AI systems are reshaping what machines can do. Yet this transformation brings with it profound ethical, social, and philosophical questions that society has barely begun to grapple with.

Proponents of AI development argue that the technology holds enormous potential for human flourishing. Machine learning algorithms can identify patterns in medical data that would take human doctors years to detect, potentially saving millions of lives. In climate science, AI models can process vast quantities of environmental data, improving our ability to predict and respond to extreme weather events. Economically, automation is projected to create new categories of employment even as it displaces others — a pattern observed during every previous technological revolution.

Critics, however, point to a range of serious concerns. The opacity of many AI systems — often described as 'black boxes' — makes it difficult to understand how decisions are made, raising accountability issues when those decisions affect employment, credit, or criminal justice. Algorithmic bias, where AI systems perpetuate or amplify existing social inequalities, has been documented in contexts ranging from facial recognition to hiring software.

Navigating these questions requires interdisciplinary collaboration — technologists, ethicists, policymakers, and the public must engage together. The choices made in the next decade will shape the trajectory of this technology for generations to come.
reading.author: Adapted from a contemporary technology essay

questions.question: What term does the author use to describe AI systems whose decision-making is not transparent?
questions.explanation: The text refers to AI systems as 'black boxes' — a term used when the internal workings are not visible or understandable.

questions.question: What does the author imply by comparing AI to 'every previous technological revolution' in the context of employment?
options: That AI will destroy all jobs permanently.
That technological change typically both eliminates some jobs and creates new ones.
That previous revolutions had no impact on employment.
That AI is less disruptive than previous technologies.
questions.explanation: The author says AI will 'create new categories of employment even as it displaces others — a pattern observed during every previous technological revolution', implying this is a recurring historical process.

questions.question: A student argues: 'This text is biased because it only presents arguments for AI development.' Is this a valid criticism?
options: Yes, the text only praises AI and ignores criticism.
No, the text is biased against AI and ignores its benefits.
No, the text presents both benefits and serious criticisms, and calls for collaborative decision-making.
Yes, the text fails to mention any real-world examples of AI.
questions.explanation: The text dedicates equal attention to proponents (paragraph 2) and critics (paragraph 3). The conclusion calls for interdisciplinary collaboration — a balanced position. The student's claim is not valid.

helpText: Det här är en analytisk text – identifiera textens argument, motargument och slutsats.
Akademiska texter har ofta en TES (claim) som stöds av EVIDENS (evidence).
Läs kritiskt: Vad är välgrundat? Vad är en åsikt? Vad är ett faktapåstående?
'Bortom raderna'-frågor kräver att du applicerar textens idéer på nya situationer.
Tips: Identifiera nyckeltermer och definitioner – de är centrala för frågorna.

reading.title: Extract: The Quiet Protocol
reading.description: Litterär text — dystopisk fiktion om kontroll och motstånd.
reading.text:
The morning briefing arrived at precisely 07:00, as it always did. Mira had long since stopped reading it in full. The language was the same — reassuring, measured, deliberately bland — and the message never varied: the situation was improving, the Protocol was working, patience was required.

She ate her breakfast standing at the window. Below, the street was almost empty. The few people who moved along the pavement did so quickly, heads angled downward, the particular gait of those who had learned that eye contact was an invitation to misunderstanding. Mira remembered — was it five years ago, six? — when this street had been full of voices, when arguments had spilled out from café tables onto the cobblestones.

The notification chimed. A flag had been placed on yesterday's search history. 'Climate of Solidarity, 1989' — a book, nothing more. She had been curious about a historical reference in an article. Now, presumably, she would need to explain herself.

Mira set down her coffee cup with the careful deliberateness she had cultivated over the past few years. She was not afraid, she told herself. Fear was useful only when there was still something to protect.

She thought of her daughter, asleep in the next room. Then she opened the reply window and began to type.
reading.author: Original fiction for Engelskajakten

questions.question: What had Mira stopped doing with the morning briefings?
questions.explanation: The text says 'Mira had long since stopped reading it in full.'

questions.question: What does 'eye contact was an invitation to misunderstanding' reveal about the society?
options: People in this society are naturally shy.
The society is one where social interaction is dangerous and monitored.
Eye contact is considered rude in this culture.
People are too busy to greet each other.
questions.explanation: This phrase implies that even ordinary human contact carries risk — it could be misinterpreted or reported. This reveals a surveillance society where people self-censor out of fear.

questions.question: The final sentence — 'Then she opened the reply window and began to type' — is deliberately ambiguous. What is the most significant aspect of this ambiguity?
options: We don't know if Mira is a fast or slow typist.
It is unclear whether Mira is writing a compliant explanation or beginning an act of resistance.
We don't know who she is writing to.
It is unclear what time of day it is.
questions.explanation: The ending withholds whether Mira submits (writing an explanation) or resists (writing something subversive). Her thought about her daughter deepens the dilemma — does she comply or resist?

helpText: Det här är en litterär text – fokusera på karaktärer, tema, språkliga val och symbolik.
Litterär analys: Vad antyder texten? Vilken stämning skapas? Vilka teman finns?
Dystopisk fiktion utforskar ofta teman som kontroll, makt och motstånd.
'Mellan raderna' och 'bortom raderna'-frågor dominerar – det handlar om tolkning!
Tips: Lägg märke till ord med stark laddning – de avslöjar textens perspektiv.

spelling.title: Analys

exercises.question: Vilket ord stavas rätt? ('hypotes')
exercises.explanation: Hypothesis stavas H-Y-P-O-T-H-E-S-I-S.
exercises.hint: Tänk noggrant på grammatikregeln för denna fråga.

exercises.sentence: The ___ of the results was discussed in the conclusion. (betydelse)
exercises.hint: Tänk noggrant på grammatikregeln för denna fråga.
exercises.explanation: Significance = betydelse. Stavas S-I-G-N-I-F-I-C-A-N-C-E.

exercises.question: Vilket ord stavas rätt? ('metodologi')
exercises.explanation: Methodology stavas M-E-T-H-O-D-O-L-O-G-Y.
exercises.hint: Tänk noggrant på grammatikregeln för denna fråga.

exercises.sentence: A rainbow is a natural ___. (fenomen)
exercises.hint: Tänk noggrant på grammatikregeln för denna fråga.
exercises.explanation: Phenomenon stavas P-H-E-N-O-M-E-N-O-N.

exercises.question: Vilket ord stavas rätt? ('syntes')
exercises.explanation: Synthesis stavas S-Y-N-T-H-E-S-I-S.
exercises.hint: Tänk noggrant på grammatikregeln för denna fråga.

helpText: Akademiska analysord förekommer i uppsatser, rapporter och vetenskapliga texter.
Centrala ord: analyse, evaluate, interpret, conclude, demonstrate, indicate, suggest.
Tips: Många analytiska ord slutar på -ate (evaluate, demonstrate) eller -ify (identify, clarify).

spelling.title: Argumentation

exercises.question: Vilket ord stavas rätt? ('motargument')
exercises.explanation: Counterargument stavas C-O-U-N-T-E-R-A-R-G-U-M-E-N-T.
exercises.hint: Tänk noggrant på grammatikregeln för denna fråga.

exercises.sentence: The speaker's ___ was damaged by the false statistics. (trovärdighet)
exercises.hint: Tänk noggrant på grammatikregeln för denna fråga.
exercises.explanation: Credibility = trovärdighet. Stavas C-R-E-D-I-B-I-L-I-T-Y.

exercises.question: Vilket ord stavas rätt? ('övertygande')
exercises.explanation: Persuasive stavas P-E-R-S-U-A-S-I-V-E.
exercises.hint: Tänk noggrant på grammatikregeln för denna fråga.

exercises.sentence: The essay was ___, with each paragraph linking to the next. (sammanhängande)
exercises.hint: Tänk noggrant på grammatikregeln för denna fråga.
exercises.explanation: Coherent = sammanhängande. Stavas C-O-H-E-R-E-N-T.

exercises.question: Vilket ord stavas rätt? ('betona')
exercises.explanation: Emphasise stavas E-M-P-H-A-S-I-S-E.
exercises.hint: Tänk noggrant på grammatikregeln för denna fråga.

helpText: Avancerade argumentationsord för debatter, essäer och akademiska diskussioner.
Centrala ord: substantiate, corroborate, refute, contradict, concede, premise, assertion.
Tips: Dela upp långa ord i delar – 'cor-rob-or-ate'. Latin/franska rötter dyker upp ofta.

spelling.title: Akademisk stil

exercises.question: Vilket ord stavas rätt? ('följaktligen')
exercises.explanation: Consequently stavas C-O-N-S-E-Q-U-E-N-T-L-Y.
exercises.hint: Tänk noggrant på grammatikregeln för denna fråga.

exercises.sentence: ___, more research is needed to confirm the results. (dessutom/vidare)
exercises.hint: Tänk noggrant på grammatikregeln för denna fråga.
exercises.explanation: Furthermore = dessutom. Stavas F-U-R-T-H-E-R-M-O-R-E.

exercises.question: Vilket ord stavas rätt? ('icke desto mindre')
exercises.explanation: Nevertheless stavas N-E-V-E-R-T-H-E-L-E-S-S.
exercises.hint: Tänk noggrant på grammatikregeln för denna fråga.

exercises.sentence: The results were ___ published in a journal. (efterföljande/sedan)
exercises.hint: Tänk noggrant på grammatikregeln för denna fråga.
exercises.explanation: Subsequently = efterföljande. Stavas S-U-B-S-E-Q-U-E-N-T-L-Y.

exercises.question: Vilket ord stavas rätt? ('hävdas/förmodligen')
exercises.explanation: Arguably stavas A-R-G-U-A-B-L-Y.
exercises.hint: Tänk noggrant på grammatikregeln för denna fråga.

helpText: Akademiska stilmarkörer och konnektiv för professionella och formella texter.
Centrala ord: consequently, furthermore, nevertheless, notwithstanding, henceforth.
Tips: Lär dig ett ord per dag och använd det aktivt i din skrivning – det fastnar bäst så.

spelling.title: Samhällsfrågor
spelling.description: Stava ord för komplexa samhällsfrågor på engelska.

exercises.question: Vilket ord stavas rätt? ('hållbarhet')
exercises.explanation: Sustainability stavas S-U-S-T-A-I-N-A-B-I-L-I-T-Y.
exercises.hint: Tänk noggrant på grammatikregeln för denna fråga.

exercises.sentence: The ___ between rich and poor is growing. (ojämlikhet)
exercises.hint: Tänk noggrant på grammatikregeln för denna fråga.
exercises.explanation: Inequality = ojämlikhet. Stavas I-N-E-Q-U-A-L-I-T-Y.

exercises.question: Vilket ord stavas rätt? ('ansvarsskyldighet')
exercises.explanation: Accountability stavas A-C-C-O-U-N-T-A-B-I-L-I-T-Y.
exercises.hint: Tänk noggrant på grammatikregeln för denna fråga.

exercises.sentence: Governments use cameras for ___ in public spaces. (övervakning)
exercises.hint: Tänk noggrant på grammatikregeln för denna fråga.
exercises.explanation: Surveillance = övervakning. Stavas S-U-R-V-E-I-L-L-A-N-C-E.

exercises.question: Vilket ord stavas rätt? ('representation')
exercises.explanation: Representation stavas R-E-P-R-E-S-E-N-T-A-T-I-O-N.
exercises.hint: Tänk noggrant på grammatikregeln för denna fråga.

helpText: Ord för komplexa samhällsfrågor – viktiga i diskussioner om politik, miljö och etik.
Centrala ord: sustainability, inequality, infrastructure, legislation, implementation.
Tips: Koppla varje ord till en aktuell nyhet eller debatt du känner till.

spelling.title: Svåra stavningsord
spelling.description: De allra svåraste engelska orden att stava rätt.

exercises.question: Vilket ord stavas rätt? ('boende/logi')
exercises.explanation: Accommodation stavas A-C-C-O-M-M-O-D-A-T-I-O-N. Dubbel C och dubbel M.
exercises.hint: Tänk noggrant på grammatikregeln för denna fråga.

exercises.sentence: Please do not ___ the story. (överdriva)
exercises.hint: Tänk noggrant på grammatikregeln för denna fråga.
exercises.explanation: Exaggerate = överdriva. Stavas E-X-A-G-G-E-R-A-T-E.

exercises.question: Vilket ord stavas rätt? ('förekomst/händelse')
exercises.explanation: Occurrence stavas O-C-C-U-R-R-E-N-C-E. Dubbel C och dubbel R.
exercises.hint: Tänk noggrant på grammatikregeln för denna fråga.

exercises.sentence: Listen to your ___ when making a difficult decision. (samvete)
exercises.hint: Tänk noggrant på grammatikregeln för denna fråga.
exercises.explanation: Conscience = samvete. Stavas C-O-N-S-C-I-E-N-C-E.

exercises.question: Vilket ord stavas rätt? ('samvetsgrann')
exercises.explanation: Conscientious stavas C-O-N-S-C-I-E-N-T-I-O-U-S.
exercises.hint: Tänk noggrant på grammatikregeln för denna fråga.

helpText: De allra svåraste engelska orden att stava rätt – var extra noga med varje bokstav!
Vanliga fel: accommodation (2 c, 2 m), occurrence (2 c, 2 r), embarrassment (2 r, 2 s).
Tips: Lär dig ett minnesknep per ord. 'necessary': ett C, två S – 'Never Eat Cake, Eat Salad Sandwiches'.

words.clue: Säger en sak, menar en annan

wordsearch.title: Akademiska nyckelord
wordsearch.description: Hitta avancerade akademiska ord som används i uppsatser och analyser.

wordsearch.title: Globala frågor
wordsearch.description: Hitta ord kopplade till viktiga globala samhällsfrågor.

clues.clue: A visual representation of an area
A cosy room / an animal's lair
An expert / a service ace in tennis

crossword.title: Korsord: Formellt register
crossword.description: Ord du möter i akademiska och formella texter.

clues.clue: Belonging to her — a formal pronoun
To sprint / a scoring ___ in baseball
